Container.Name: FileCatalog
Container.Overview: A self-contained NAS file indexer with a web-based search UI and built-in volume scanner. Recursively catalogs your NAS shares into a searchable index. Search by filename or path, filter by file type, copy Windows UNC paths to clipboard, and scan new volumes directly from the browser. No external database required — uses SQLite stored in a mapped volume.

Config.Name: API Host
Config.Description: IP address or hostname of your UNRAID server — used by the browser to reach the API (e.g. 192.168.1.100)

Config.Name: Database Storage
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database file is stored on the host

Config.Name: NAS Shares
Config.Description: Mount your UNRAID user shares so the scanner can index them

Config.Name: Port
Config.Description: Internal port the server listens on (change only if needed)

Config.Name: Database Path
Config.Description: Path to the SQLite database file inside the container
